title: kanbus_clock: use parent_snapshot for bottom row allocation
description: bottom_count currently branches on parent_lines truthiness in created/transition/comment layout paths. Use parent_snapshot presence directly for deterministic row allocation and avoid accidental regressions if row generation changes.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting fix: switch bottom_count guards from parent_lines truthiness to parent_snapshot presence in issue_created/state_transition/comment_added layout paths.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented: bottom_count now keys off parent_snapshot presence (not parent_lines) in issue_created/state_transition/comment_added paths. Validation: py_compile + pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (55 passed).
